jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Livspace
jsonLd.description:
Join the Livspace family as a SEO Specialist in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Livspace:
Livspace is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
